mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.member_id, r.course_id, r.status, r.create_time, r.cancel_time, m.real_name AS member_name, m.username AS member_username, c.name AS course_name, c.coach AS course_coach, c.schedule_time AS course_schedule_time, c.location AS course_location FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN course c ON r.course_id = c.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.member_id, r.course_id, r.status, r.create_time, r.cancel_time, m.real_name AS member_name, m.username AS member_username, c.name AS course_name, c.coach AS course_coach, c.schedule_time AS course_schedule_time, c.location AS course_location FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN course c ON r.course_id = c.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT r.id, r.member_id, r.course_id, r.status, r.create_time, r.cancel_time, m.real_name AS member_name, m.username AS member_username, c.name AS course_name, c.coach AS course_coach, c.schedule_time AS course_schedule_time, c.location AS course_location FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN course c ON r.course_id = c.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT id, member_id, course_id, status, create_time, cancel_time FROM reservation WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT r.id, r.member_id, r.course_id, r.status, r.create_time, r.cancel_time, m.real_name AS member_name, m.username AS member_username, c.name AS course_name, c.coach AS course_coach, c.schedule_time AS course_schedule_time, c.location AS course_location FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN course c ON r.course_id = c.id WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT r.id, r.member_id, r.course_id, r.status, r.create_time, r.cancel_time, m.real_name AS member_name, m.username AS member_username, c.name AS course_name, c.coach AS course_coach, c.schedule_time AS course_schedule_time, c.location AS course_location FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN course c ON r.course_id = c.id WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT id, member_id, course_id, status, create_time, cancel_time FROM reservation WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, member_id, course_id, status, create_time, cancel_time FROM reservation WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (member_id, course_id, status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{courseId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE reservation SET status = 0, cancel_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE status = #{status}
